title: Website Development
content: We build lightning-fast, ultra-secure websites tailored to your business needs.
details:
**Overview**: Snortweb Technology specializes in creating high-performance digital experiences. We use React, Node.js, and cutting-edge cloud architectures to ensure your website is fast, responsive, and secure.

**Benefits**: Increased conversions, military-grade security, and a premium UI/UX design.

**Timeline**: Typically 2-6 weeks depending on project complexity.

**Support**: We provide 24/7 maintenance and dedicated post-launch support.
relatedQuestions: How much does a website cost?

title: UI/UX & Redesign
content: We design stunning, user-centric interfaces that engage and convert visitors into loyal customers.
details:
**Overview**: A beautiful website is nothing without a seamless user experience. We focus on modern design trends, accessibility, and conversion rate optimization (CRO).

**Benefits**: Lower bounce rates, higher user engagement, and a memorable brand image.
relatedQuestions: Can you redesign my existing website?

title: Website Maintenance
content: Keep your digital assets secure and up-to-date with our comprehensive maintenance plans.
details:
**Overview**: Our maintenance plans ensure your website remains fast, secure, and fully operational without any downtime.

**Benefits**: Peace of mind, protection against zero-day exploits, and continuous performance improvements.
